channel.title: GitHub Discovery
channel.description: Discover trending GitHub repos before they go viral

item.title: 🔥 mauriceboe/TREK — 6856⭐ (70.0/day)
item.description:
A self-hosted travel/trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists, and more.
Score: 100/100 | Language: TypeScript

item.title: 🔥 every-app/open-seo — 2622⭐ (22.2/day)
item.description:
Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs
Score: 100/100 | Language: TypeScript

item.title: 🔥 garrytan/gstack — 115938⭐ (1093.8/day)
item.description:
Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
Score: 100/100 | Language: TypeScript

item.title: 🔥 mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills — 21359⭐ (178.0/day)
item.description:
817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF & MITRE F3 (Fight Fraud) · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 29 security domains · Apache 2.0
Score: 100/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 alibaba/page-agent — 19937⭐ (72.5/day)
item.description:
JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.
Score: 100/100 | Language: TypeScript

item.title: 🔥 google-labs-code/design.md — 19625⭐ (258.2/day)
item.description:
A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.
Score: 100/100 | Language: TypeScript

item.title: 🔥 calesthio/OpenMontage — 22387⭐ (254.4/day)
item.description:
World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
Score: 100/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 apple/container — 43304⭐ (110.8/day)
item.description:
A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
Score: 100/100 | Language: Swift

item.title: 🔥 QwenLM/Qwen-AgentWorld — 338⭐ (169.0/day)
item.description:
Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents
Score: 100/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 BohemiaInteractive/CWR — 257⭐ (128.5/day)
item.description:
Arma: Cold War Assault Remastered Source Code Repository.
Score: 100/100 | Language: C

item.title: 🔥 krea-ai/krea-2 — 193⭐ (96.5/day)
item.description:
Official inference code for Krea 2
Score: 100/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 calesthio/OpenMontage — 19963⭐ (229.5/day)
item.description:
World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
Score: 96/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis — 48782⭐ (295.6/day)
item.description:
LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.
Score: 96/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 HKUDS/AgentSpace — 365⭐ (182.5/day)
item.description:
"AgentSpace: Human + Agents. One Team. One Workspace"
Score: 100/100 | Language: TypeScript

item.title: 🔥 samasante/liquid-glass — 293⭐ (146.5/day)
item.description:
Apple-style Liquid Glass for the web — a headless React lens that refracts the live DOM in Safari, Firefox and Chrome. Zero dependencies.
Score: 100/100 | Language: TypeScript

item.title: 🔥 nova452/ComfyUI-ConditioningKrea2Rebalance — 205⭐ (205.0/day)
item.description:
A conditioning optimizer with per layer weighting that offers IP-Adapter-like features for Krea 2 along with bypassing the built in quality diluation from the trained safety filter and also works as a means to unfilter the model.
Score: 100/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 sums001/Windows-Copilot-API — 434⭐ (144.7/day)
item.description:

item.title: 🔥 raiyanyahya/recall — 360⭐ (120.0/day)
